programmes.show_description: A man is brutally beaten to death in a Lancashire basement squat in the early hours. With the only suspect denying any involvement, can detectives separate the truth from the lies?
...The Virginia McCullough Confessions. In 2023, Virginia was charged with murdering her parents. This documentary explores how she lived alongside her parents' dead bodies for five years.
Crime documentary series. In this episode, interceptor Barry outsmarts a disqualified driver and Carl makes a jaw-dropping discovery when he pulls a car over in the early hours.
Barry hunts a lad wanted for assault, the police are on the tail of a suspected drug dealer and a drink driver tries everything to avoid giving a breath sample.
A foul-mouthed pensioner pushes Barry's patience to the limit, and Sarah Capes gives a bad boy biker an early birthday present.

Love is in the air as DJ Jessie goes on a blind date, while finance pro Andrea has big new money-making plans, working on building a venue to host events and functions.
Mike and Yvonne, who share their thrifty food adventures online, are on a mission to lose weight, while dog groomer Jodie is training her new apprentice Ellie.
Graeme Hall revisits furry dictator Dave, a Saint Bernard, to address a new power struggle. And Kerry's troublesome Yorkie Teddy is keeping her prisoner in her own home.
The firearms team are called in as an elderly couple may be involved in attempted murder. A mysterious traffic incident sees a car upside down and on fire.
An intelligence operation identifies a car thought to be involved in drug trafficking, but becomes a case of suspected fraud.
Cops chase a 15-year-old in a stolen Audi at 140mph down the M62, and discover a boot full of stolen goods at the scene of a serious traffic accident.
Documentary series. The interceptors of Durham and Cleveland tackle a stand-off between armed officers and a dangerous knifeman and a man wielding a length of guttering.
Interceptors are called to an emergency landing at Durham Tees Valley Airport.
Kev Salter and Ian Squire hunt for a man roaming the late-night streets with a machete.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Specialist car recovery companies help local governments and businesses take care of illegal or dangerous vehicles by getting them off the road.
Remi starts radiation therapy. Will Lacey see through Holden's lies? Justin romances Leah.
Leah crafts a romantic apology. Cash ignores a stern warning. Tane's reunited with his son.
Alcoholic Angela is suffering from injuries sustained in a fight. It is an uphill battle to convince Brian to quit smoking - he started in 1954.
Junior Doctor Jake Mullen assesses 44-year old Kay who arrives at the hospital with flu-like symptoms. He runs the risk of contracting a highly contagious strain of flu.
A motorcyclist is rushed in for an emergency operation to stop internal bleeding; a doctor treats a patient run over by a car that she herself had just been in.
A man suffering a suspected cardiac arrest collapses at the wheel, crashing his car. And a holiday ends abruptly when a man tumbles out of the hot tub in a remote log cabin.
The first episode of the new series features a lipoma so large it may not be safe to tackle under local anaesthetic, and a woman who's had alopecia for over 20 years.

programmes.show_name: Call the Bailiffs: Time to Pay Up!
programmes.show_description: Mark and Sam chase a £7,000 debt over a car sold with disputed mileage, leading to seized luxury cars, tense negotiations, and claims of damage to an enforcement agent's vehicle.
Documentary series. A couple agree to rent a property to its former owner who now refuses to leave, and a single mum tricks her way into a property.
Documentary series. Dr Watson offers 'talking therapy' to a young lady who recently lost her mother and Dr Bower treats a gentleman who is plagued by suicidal thoughts.
Dr Dev Shah treats a Nottingham Forest fan with a large head cyst, and Dr Toby Nelson deals with a series of mini lipomas that look like a string of pearls.
The Female Entrepreneurs attempt to out-quiz the Eggheads.

Scuba instructor Louise dives for her dream, entertainer Andy hopes his Benidorm career takes flight, and we catch up with cheese entrepreneurs Deb and Dave.
Show bar owners Andrea and Paul take on a new challenge in an attempt to draw in a younger crowd, while chip shop owner Caroline settles into her new apartment.
...What Happened Next? Graeme Hall meets Labrador party animals Winston and Harland, whose non-stop shenanigans are out of control. In Bath, Graeme meets Lupo who's going loco again.
The Traffic Cops are called to an accident involving a motorbike, and on the road to Harrogate a group of bikers get into an altercation with a motorist.
In Harrogate, police on patrol face an escalating situation until they are the ones under threat. Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston.
A pursuit is aborted when the driver pulls over to relieve himself, and the cops find an open crate of lager. Action-packed observational documentary series with Jamie Theakston.
The hunt for a suspected armed robber turns up a nasty surprise. Documentary series following the police interceptors of Durham and Cleveland.
Damo Stevens hunts down a heroin dealer, Jacko rushes to a critical car crash, and Kev discovers something in an airing cupboard.
The high-speed police teams cope with an aggressive arsonist in Darlington, a violent domestic disturbance, a runaway quad biker and a team of suspected thieves.

programmes.show_name: Car Pound Cops: Give Me My Car...
programmes.show_description: ...Back! Following car recovery companies that are tasked with taking illegal, unroadworthy, untaxed, uninsured vehicles off the road and ensuring their owners pay the penalty.
Leah crafts a romantic apology. Cash ignores a stern warning. Tane's reunited with his son.
Cash is shut out. Jo picks a side. Harper lashes out.
Reality series. A patient is furious that his ears are still blocked - despite missing hospital appointments to have them syringed.
The team continues to work together to help the ill and injured of South Yorkshire, aiding patients suffer-ing from heart attacks, road traffic collisions and allergic reactions.
When Rachel is admitted to Royal Stoke emergency department after a head-on collision with another car, trauma team leader Anthony fears the worst.
Paramedics are called when a woman is flung from her horse, and paramedic Mark and police constable Calum respond to a collision between a car driver and a 13-year-old E-scooter rider.
